## Summary

Describe the change and its purpose.

## Feature-preservation checklist

- [ ] Existing behavior remains compatible.
- [ ] No feature was removed, disabled, or silently simplified.
- [ ] Security-sensitive behavior was reviewed.
- [ ] Documentation and changelog were updated where necessary.
- [ ] `bash scripts/validate.sh` passes.

## Testing evidence

List the commands, environments, and manual checks performed.

## Security and privacy

- [ ] No credentials, license keys, API keys, device fingerprints, IP addresses, or production dumps are included.
- [ ] Screenshots and logs are sanitized.
